MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-20-2021 IN 206, JUDGE FENG RECUSED HIMSELF FROM THIS MATTER AND PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL IS HEARD BEFORE JUDGE MASSULLO. SELF-REPRESENTED PLAINTIFF/MOVING PARTY ELENA LAUCHUNG APPEARED IN COURT. TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE BY ATTORNEY MARCUS MCELHENNEY FOR DEFENDANTS THROUGH COURTCALL. COURT-CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER, PATRICE BINAISA, IS PRESENT IN COURT FOR PLAINTIFF. THE COURT GIVES HER IMPRESSION ON THE MERITS OF THE MOTION TO PARTIES. AFTER ARGUMENTS AND THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO VERIFY THAT ATTORNEY STEVEN MACDONALD (415) 649-3423, WILL BE SUBSTITUTING INTO THE CASE TO REPRESENT PLAINTIFF, THE COURT DENIED PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL. THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE OF 7/26/21 IS MAINTAINED AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. THE COURT WILL ISSUE AN ORDER AFTER HEARING. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: D. LOK; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON AUG-26-2021; ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE AS TO WHY ELENA LAUCHUNG SHOULD NOT BE DECLARED A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT IS ON CALENDAR FOR HEARING. AT 3:04 PM - COURT STAFF CHECKS THE HALLWAY FROM DEPT. 204 TO DEPT. 212 AND SEES NO APPEARANCE BY MS. LAUCHUNG. COURT STAFF CHECKS THE VOICEMAILS FOR DEPT. 206 AND THERE IS NO MESSAGE FROM MS. LAUCHUNG. NO APPEARANCES. SPANISH INTERPRETER, MONICA HERNANDEZ, IS PRESENT IN COURT. THERE BEING NO PLEADINGS FILED BY MS. LAUCHUNG FOR THIS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE AND THERE BEING REASONS TO SUPPORT THE RULING, THE COURT DECLARES ELENA LAUCHUNG A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT. THE COURT WILL ISSUE AN ORDER AND COPIES WILL BE SERVED ON ALL PARTIES INCLUDING THE JUDICIAL COUNCIL. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: D. LOK; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER DECLARING ELENA LAUCHUNG A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRIAL COURT)
Off Calendar Aug-26-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause on Aug-26-2021; Order to Show Cause as to why Elena Lauchung should not be declared a vexatious litigant is on calendar for hearing. At 3:04 pm - Court staff checks the hallway from Dept. 204 to Dept. 212 and sees no appearance by Ms. Lauchung. Court staff checks the voicemails for Dept. 206 and there is no message from Ms. Lauchung. No appearances. Spanish Interpreter, Monica Hernandez, is present in court. There being no pleadings filed by Ms. Lauchung for this order to show cause and there being reasons to support the ruling, the Court declares Elena Lauchung a vexatious litigant. The court will issue an order and copies will be served on all parties including the Judicial Council. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: D. Lok; Court Reporter: Matter not reported. (206)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Jun-28-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ligia Parmenter, Esq. 415-738-7901 of Parmenter Law Offices, Moving party By Court Call.
Elena LauChung, Plaintiff is present in the courtroom.
Spanish Interpreter Muriel Falak assists Plaintiff by Zoom.

RULING - A R G U E D. Plaintiff requests more time to get new counsel. The Court shares its views. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF ELENA LAUCHUNG'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL.

The Court adopts the tenttive ruling. GRANTED. No opposition filed. Counsel to prepare order. Order is signed after the hearing. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (501)
